title: MD
biography: Hippocrates of Kos is regarded as the Father of Medicine. He established medicine as a rational discipline separate from religion, introduced the concept of clinical observation, and is credited with the Hippocratic Oath.
aiSummary: Hippocrates is a medicine specialist at School of Kos. Based in Greece.

timeline.title: Established rational medicine
timeline.description: Separated medicine from religion and superstition, advocating for systematic observation and ethical practice
